activated_rules.rule_name: Letter of Credit (LC) exception - NOT activated
General goods description with invoice reference
EU origin normalization with additional EU member states in invoice

consignor.certificate_value:
Bohus BioTech AB
Trädgårdsgatan 4
SE-452 31, STRÖMSTAD
Sweden
consignor.invoice_value:
Bohus Biotech AB
Trädgårdsgatan 4
45231 Strömstad
SWEDEN
consignor.motivation: Consignor 'Bohus BioTech AB' from Sweden in the certificate is explicitly found in the invoice in the invoicer's name and address block, with allowed normalization of legal form (AB ↔ AB), spacing and capitalization. No conflicting parties found. Land matches after normalization.

consignee.certificate_value:
NT Solutions Co LTD
35 A4 Street
Ward 12
Tan Binh District
70000 Ho Chi Minh City
Viet Nam
consignee.invoice_value:
Dr. Salem Al-Ajmi company
Building 9, Apartment 14
Block 3, Street 9
20003 Salmiya
KUWAIT
consignee.motivation: Consignee 'NT Solutions Co LTD' from Viet Nam in certificate does not appear in any invoice party fields. Invoice consignee/buyer is 'Dr. Salem Al-Ajmi company' located in Kuwait. Certificate consignee cannot be matched to primary invoicing party or delivery address in invoice, causing mismatch.

goods_description.certificate_value:
Medical devices Total Net weight 3 boxes: 24,75kg
Minivisc Plus; MPFY24100B, 750pcs
goods_description.motivation: Certificate uses a general goods description with an explicit commercial invoice number and date (Invoice no. 240, date 2025-11-24), which matches the invoice's commercial invoice 250 dated 2026-01-13 closely but with date discrepancy. Varubeskrivningen texts differ significantly ('Medical devices' vs 'Decoria Intense Strong'), so match by text is unclear. Manual review is needed.

quantity.motivation: Quantity in certificate is 24.75 kg net weight, but invoice total net weight is 89.25 kg. The invoice value deviates significantly and the matching numeric value is not found. No allowed exceptions apply; result is mismatch.

origin.invoice_value:
Country of Origin: Sweden
These products are of European Community preferential origin
origin.motivation: Ursprungsland 'Sweden' from certificate explicitly appears in the invoice under 'Country of Origin: Sweden' statement. EU origin normalization applies as certificate uses 'European Union' and invoice confirms 'European Community preferential origin.' No conflicting origins found.

overall_assessment.decision_summary: Consignor and origin match properly, but consignee and quantity differ significantly. Goods description match is unclear due to different texts and invoice date mismatch. Manual handling is advised.
overall_assessment.human_explanation: Consignornamnet och ursprungslandet kan verifieras korrekt. Mottagaren i certifikatet skiljer sig från fakturans mottagare och kvantiteten stämmer inte överens. Varubeskrivningen är otydlig och behöver manuell granskning.
